test-appsettings-allprops-2026-07-09.description: Comprehensive xUnit test project for all 8 AppSettings properties (32 tests, all green, net8.0).

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-07-08.description: Add Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right global hotkeys for colour temperature. Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

feature-start-with-windows-2026-07-08.description: Add Start with Windows toggle in system tray (HKCU Run registry). Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-persist-settings-2026-07-08.description: Persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn + hotkey conflict balloon tip. Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-monitor-index-2026-07-06.description: Fix IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors are unplugged.

perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06.description: Coalesce mouse hook dispatches using Interlocked.CompareExchange.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests. Branches are pushed to remote but no actual GitHub PRs created.
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

notes: 2026-07-09 run (01:17 UTC): Tasks 2+9. Task 2: no new user issues to comment on (#24 already has 2 Repo Assist comments, no new human activity). Task 9: Created comprehensive test branch covering ALL 8 AppSettings properties (32 tests vs existing branch's 18 tests covering only ExcludeFromCapture). Duplicate issues #121/#122 exist (duplicates of #91/#94); added to monthly summary.
